_review_note: 90-case review 2026-06-23: 5 applied to DB (Casa Maestri x4 -> Mexico, Temptech fridge -> Norway). Remaining human cases reviewed: 66 confirmed DB-already-correct (mostly accessories: mfr country is right, ignore appellation-in-name), Rivo gin kept Italy (DB region Lombardy consistent; subagent 'England' rejected), Tequila Rose kept USA (McCormick US-made), Vacu Vin kept Poland (mfr country). 10 unresolved: 5 Silverlake (AU vs Thai-bottled bulk) + 4-5 Plantation rums (multi-island blends, need origin policy).
